headline: Mondelēz rethinks chocolate innovation as cocoa price hangover lingers
summary: The Toblerone maker is selling more bars with fillings like caramel and nougat while expanding its premium lineup even as costs for the commodity have come down from record highs.

raw.headline: Mondelēz rethinks chocolate innovation as cocoa price hangover lingers

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Risk Off Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Investors turn to high dividend-yielding stocks in turbulent markets. Benzinga offers latest analyst ratings and accuracy data for top consumer staples stocks.
